name: SaaS Header
description: SaaS product header with login and signup
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{loginText}}{{ctaText}}
css: .header { padding: 1rem 0; background: #fff; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0ea5e9; text-decoration: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: #64748b; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #0ea5e9; } .header-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; } .btn-ghost { color: #0c4a6e; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .btn-primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } }

name: SaaS Hero
description: SaaS hero with value proposition and signup CTA
html:
{{badge}}

{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{#each fields}}{{/each}}

{{note}}
css: .hero { padding: 6rem 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f9ff 0%, #fff 100%); } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .hero-content { max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; } .hero-badge { display: inline-block; background: #e0f2fe; color: #0284c7; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border-radius: 2rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .hero-title { font-size: 3.75rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0c4a6e; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.25rem; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.6; } .hero-form { margin-bottom: 1rem; } .email-form { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-input { flex: 1; padding: 0.875rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-size: 1rem; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0ea5e9; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,0.1); } .btn-primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } .hero-note { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #94a3b8; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero { padding: 4rem 0; } .hero-title { font-size: 2.5rem; } .email-form { flex-direction: column; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } }

title.default: Build, Ship, and Scale Your SaaS Faster

subtitle.default: The all-in-one platform that handles authentication, billing, analytics, and deployment so you can focus on what makes your product unique.

note.default: Free forever for individuals. No credit card required.

name: SaaS Features
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each features}}
{{icon}}

{{title}}

{{description}}

{{/each}}
css: .features { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0c4a6e; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .section-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #64748b; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .feature-card { padding: 2rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .feature-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.1); } .feature-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .feature-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0c4a6e; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .feature-desc { color: #64748b; line-height: 1.6; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .features-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: Powerful features that handle the complexity so you can focus on your product

default.title: Authentication
default.description: SSO, OAuth, and magic links out of the box. Secure by default.

default.title: Billing & Payments
default.description: Stripe integration with subscription management and invoicing.

default.title: Analytics Dashboard
default.description: Real-time metrics, user behavior tracking, and custom reports.

default.title: One-Click Deploy
default.description: Deploy to any cloud provider with zero configuration.

default.title: API-First
default.description: RESTful API with GraphQL support. Full SDK for popular languages.

default.title: SOC 2 Compliant
default.description: Enterprise-grade security with audit logs and role-based access.

{{description}}

css: .pricing { padding: 5rem 0; background: #f0f9ff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0c4a6e; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .section-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #64748b; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .pricing-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; align-items: start; } .pricing-card { background: #fff; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; } .pricing-card.featured { border-color: #0ea5e9; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.15); } .plan-badge { position: absolute; top: -12px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; padding: 0.25rem 1rem; border-radius: 1rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .plan-name { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0c4a6e; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .plan-price { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0c4a6e; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .plan-period { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #64748b; } .plan-desc { color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .plan-features { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 1.5rem; } .plan-features li { padding: 0.5rem 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.95rem; } .plan-features li::before { content: '✓'; color: #0ea5e9; font-weight: 700; margin-right: 0.5rem; } .btn { display: block; text-align: center; padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; } .btn-primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; } .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #0ea5e9; border: 2px solid #0ea5e9; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .pricing-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; } }

description.default: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

default.name: Starter
default.description: Perfect for side projects and experiments

name: SaaS Testimonials
html:
{{title}}

{{#each testimonials}}
"{{text}}"
{{name}}{{role}}

css: .testimonials { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0c4a6e; } .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .testimonial-card { background: #f0f9ff; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; } .testimonial-text { color: #334155; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1rem; font-style: italic; } .author-name { color: #0c4a6e; display: block; } .author-role { color: #64748b; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

default.text: LaunchPad cut our time-to-market by 60%. We went from idea to production in just 2 weeks.
default.name: Sarah Chen

default.text: The authentication and billing integrations alone are worth the price. Saved us months of dev work.
default.name: Marcus Johnson

default.text: Best developer experience I've encountered. The docs are excellent and the API is intuitive.
default.name: Elena Rodriguez

name: SaaS CTA
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{buttonText}}
css: .cta { padding: 5rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9 0%, #0284c7 100%); color: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .cta-content { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .cta-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .btn-primary { background: #fff; color: #0ea5e9; padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; font-size: 1.125rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .cta { padding: 3rem 0; } .cta-title { font-size: 2rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .cta-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } }

description.default: Join thousands of developers shipping faster with LaunchPad.

css: .contact-form { padding: 5rem 0; background: #f0f9ff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; background: #fff; padding: 2.5rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .form-title { font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0c4a6e; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; text-align: center; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-size: 1rem; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0ea5e9; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,0.1); } textarea.form-input { min-height: 100px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .btn-primary { background: #0ea5e9; color: #fff; padding: 0.875rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .form-wrapper { padding: 1.5rem; } }

css: .footer { padding: 4rem 0 2rem; background: #0c4a6e; color: #94a3b8; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-desc { line-height: 1.6; } .footer-col-title { color: #fff; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-links { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .footer-links a { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #0ea5e9; } .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid #164e63; padding-top: 2rem; text-align: center; } .copyright { font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: The fastest way to build, ship, and scale your SaaS product.
